title: 断航故土
mode: single background thread for five project-level base material boards
safety_rules: Generate only the five assigned PNG files under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/base-material-boards/.
Do not edit existing project style-board images, regional color-system images, faction emblem images, or historical emblem files.
Use current stable faction emblem PNGs as references only; do not redesign, redraw, replace, or overwrite them.
Images must contain no visible text labels, captions, letters, UI, or watermarks.
Keep all outputs inside the current project root.

threads.title: 断航故土基础材质板图片生成
threads.worker_prompt: Generate the five raster base material-board images defined in project/severed-homeland/prompts/project-base-material-board-image-prompts.json for asset_batch project_base_material_boards_v01. Preserve the written design in project/severed-homeland/art/project-base-material-boards.md and the machine-readable manifest in project/severed-homeland/art/project-base-material-board-manifest.json. Reference existing images only for continuity: project/severed-homeland/assets/style/project-style-board/style_material_palette_v01.png, the current stable faction emblem PNGs under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/, and the current regional color-system PNGs under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/regional-color-system/. Do not redesign, redraw, replace, overwrite, or edit any existing style-board, regional, faction-emblem, or history asset. Write each generated PNG to its exact expected_output_path under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/base-material-boards/. Images must be vertical 9:16 cinematic tactile material boards with no visible text labels, captions, letters, UI, or watermarks. Return a compact JSON manifest listing generated files, dimensions, and any blocked items.

launch.approval_needed: User requested creation on 2026-06-02; launch the planned Codex background thread after prompt plan is written.
